channel.title: Sagnik Bhattacharya — Blog
channel.description: Useful guides on Excel, Excel with AI, and Flutter by Sagnik Bhattacharya.

item.title: Gemma 4 vs ChatGPT vs Claude vs Copilot: Best AI Model Comparison in 2026
item.description: A detailed, honest comparison of Gemma 4, ChatGPT, Claude, and Microsoft Copilot across coding, writing, data analysis, and cost. Find the right AI model for your workflow.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Gemma 4 vs GPT-4o vs Llama 4: Which Free AI Model Is Best for Excel Formulas?
item.description: Compare Gemma 4, GPT-4o, and Llama 4 for Excel formula generation. See real prompt tests, accuracy results, and which free AI model handles SUMIFS, lookups, and nested logic best.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Gemma 4 for Data Analysis: Can It Replace ChatGPT for Spreadsheet Work?
item.description: Test Gemma 4 against ChatGPT for real spreadsheet tasks — data cleaning, pivot table logic, VBA macros, and chart recommendations. Honest results with practical examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Gemma 4 vs Gemini: What’s the Difference and When to Use Which
item.description: Understand the difference between Google’s Gemma 4 and Gemini. Compare open-weight vs cloud API, privacy, cost, customisation, and which is right for your workflow.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: 5 Real-World Tasks Where Gemma 4 Beats Paid AI Models
item.description: See 5 practical tasks where Google Gemma 4 outperforms paid AI models like ChatGPT Plus and Claude Pro. Honest benchmarks on code, data, writing, and privacy-sensitive work.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Run Gemma 4 Locally for Free: A Beginner’s Guide With Ollama and LM Studio
item.description: Step-by-step guide to running Google Gemma 4 locally using Ollama and LM Studio. Covers hardware requirements, installation, performance tips, and when local beats cloud AI.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Gemma 4 in VS Code: Setup, Extensions, and Coding Workflows
item.description: Set up Gemma 4 as your local AI coding assistant in VS Code. Step-by-step guide covering extensions, Ollama integration, inline completions, and real coding workflow examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Agent Mode in Excel: What It Does, What It Can’t, and Who Should Use It
item.description: Learn what Agent Mode in Excel actually does, where it saves time, where it still needs human review, and which teams will benefit most.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: GROUPBY Function in Excel: Formula-Based Summaries Without a Pivot Table
item.description: Learn how GROUPBY works in Excel, when it beats a PivotTable, and how to use it for dynamic summaries that stay close to the source data.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter State Management in 2026: Provider vs Riverpod vs BLoC
item.description: A practical comparison of Provider, Riverpod, and BLoC for Flutter state management in 2026 — with real code examples, architecture advice, and clear recommendations for every project size.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: 60 AI Prompts for Excel That Actually Work (Copy, Paste, Get Results)
item.description: A curated library of 60 proven AI prompts for Excel — organised by task. Write formulas, clean data, build macros, analyse data, debug errors, and build dashboards using ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, or Gemini.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter Widget Previewer: Real-Time UI Iteration Without Running the Full App
item.description: Learn what Flutter Widget Previewer is good at, where it saves time, and how to fold it into a production workflow without skipping real testing.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Google Gemini to Write Excel Formulas for Free
item.description: Google Gemini is free to use and surprisingly good at Excel formulas. Learn how to prompt it for complex formulas, data analysis, and error fixes — with real examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Use Claude With Agent Mode in Excel: Setup, Limits, and Best Workflows
item.description: A practical guide to using Claude with Agent Mode in Excel, including setup expectations, current limits, and the workflows where it helps most.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use ChatGPT to Write Excel Formulas (With Real Examples)
item.description: ChatGPT can write complex Excel formulas from plain English. Learn how to prompt it effectively for formulas, VBA macros, data cleaning, and error fixes — with examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: PIVOTBY Function in Excel: Build Pivot-Style Reports With a Formula
item.description: Learn when to use PIVOTBY in Excel, how it differs from PivotTables, and how to create report-style summaries directly in formulas.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Create With AI in Flutter: Gemini CLI, MCP, and the AI Toolkit Explained
item.description: Learn how Flutter’s AI tooling story fits together, including Gemini CLI, MCP, and the AI Toolkit, without turning your app into AI-themed fluff.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use What-If Analysis in Excel: Goal Seek and Scenarios
item.description: Learn how to use Excel's What-If Analysis tools — Goal Seek, Scenario Manager, Data Tables, and Solver — to reverse-engineer targets and model multiple outcomes.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter vs React Native in 2026: Which Should You Choose?
item.description: An honest comparison of Flutter and React Native in 2026 — covering performance, developer experience, ecosystem, jobs market, and when to choose each framework.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: COPILOT Function in Excel: Syntax, Use Cases, Limits, and Risks
item.description: Learn what the COPILOT function in Excel is actually for, where it helps, what its preview limits mean, and how to review the output properly.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: GROUPBY vs PivotTable in Excel: When Formula Summaries Beat the Ribbon
item.description: Compare GROUPBY and PivotTables in Excel so you can choose the right summary tool for dashboards, recurring reports, and ad hoc analysis.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter Web in 2026: skwasm vs CanvasKit vs WebAssembly Builds
item.description: A practical guide to Flutter web renderer choices in 2026, including when skwasm, CanvasKit, and WebAssembly builds make sense.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Build a Financial Model in Excel From Scratch
item.description: Learn how to build a revenue projection and cash flow model in Excel from scratch — covering assumptions, formulas, scenarios, and best practices for beginners.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Automate Excel Tasks with Microsoft Copilot
item.description: Use Microsoft Copilot to sort, filter, format, and summarise Excel data automatically — from plain text prompts. Save hours on weekly reporting tasks.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Analyst vs Agent Mode vs Copilot Chat: Which Excel AI Workflow Fits Best?
item.description: Compare Analyst, Agent Mode, and Copilot chat in Excel so you can choose the AI surface that fits the task instead of forcing one tool everywhere.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Fix Excel Formula Errors with Claude AI (Fast)
item.description: Getting #VALUE!, #REF!, or #N/A errors? Paste your broken formula into Claude AI and get an instant diagnosis and fix — no more staring at nested parentheses.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: CHOOSECOLS, CHOOSEROWS, TAKE, and DROP in Excel: Slice Data Faster
item.description: Learn how CHOOSECOLS, CHOOSEROWS, TAKE, and DROP help you reshape modern Excel arrays without extra helper columns or manual copying.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Power Pivot in Excel to Analyse Millions of Rows
item.description: Excel's row limit is 1 million — Power Pivot breaks it. Learn how to load multiple tables, create relationships, and write DAX formulas for advanced pivot analysis.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter App Architecture in 2026: A Practical Feature-First Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Flutter app architecture in 2026, with a feature-first structure that helps teams scale without drowning in folders.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Format Data for Copilot in Excel: Tables, Supported Ranges, and Common Failures
item.description: Learn how to format data for Copilot in Excel so prompts work better, tables stay readable, and common workbook failures stop getting in the way.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Make Professional Charts in Excel (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.description: How to Make Professional Charts in Excel (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: MAP, SCAN, and REDUCE in Excel: Modern Array Logic for Power Users
item.description: Learn how MAP, SCAN, and REDUCE expand modern Excel array logic so you can transform, accumulate, and combine data more elegantly.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Add a Dropdown List in Excel Using Data Validation
item.description: Create dropdown lists, restrict cell inputs, and add custom validation rules in Excel to prevent data entry errors before they happen. Includes formula-based examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use INDEX MATCH in Excel with Multiple Criteria
item.description: INDEX MATCH is more powerful and flexible than VLOOKUP. Learn how to use it with one or multiple criteria, look left, and handle errors — with step-by-step examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: go_router in Flutter: Deep Linking, Nested Navigation, and Web URLs
item.description: Learn how go_router helps with deep linking, nested navigation, and cleaner Flutter web URLs without turning routing into a maintenance problem.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Excel vs Google Sheets: Which Is Better for You in 2026?
item.description: A feature-by-feature comparison of Excel and Google Sheets in 2026 — covering formulas, AI tools, collaboration, performance, and pricing. Which one should you use?
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Create Lookups With Copilot in Excel: When It Writes XLOOKUP Well and When It Doesn’t
item.description: Learn when Copilot is genuinely useful for XLOOKUP-style formulas in Excel, and when you should stop prompting and write or review the formula yourself.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: LET and LAMBDA in Excel: Turn Repeated Formulas Into Reusable Logic
item.description: Learn how LET and LAMBDA make complex Excel formulas easier to read, reuse, and maintain without leaving the workbook.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter Form Validation Best Practices for Production Apps
item.description: Learn practical Flutter form validation habits that keep production apps clearer, safer, and less frustrating for users and engineers alike.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: 15 Excel Formulas That Save Hours of Manual Work (With Examples)
item.description: These 15 advanced Excel formulas go beyond SUM and VLOOKUP — covering SUMPRODUCT, dynamic arrays, LAMBDA, and more. With syntax and real-world examples for each.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Generate Formula Columns With Copilot in Excel: Best Prompts and Review Steps
item.description: Learn how to use Copilot for full formula columns in Excel, including the prompt patterns and review steps that stop bad logic spreading down the sheet.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Microsoft Copilot for Data Analysis in Excel
item.description: Use Microsoft Copilot to identify trends, find outliers, create charts, and generate insights from your Excel data using natural language prompts — no formulas needed.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: XMATCH in Excel: Smarter Lookups, Reverse Searches, and Binary Search Use Cases
item.description: Learn how XMATCH improves lookup logic in Excel, including reverse searches and scenarios where binary search can make sense.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Claude AI to Write Excel Macros and VBA Code
item.description: How to Use Claude AI to Write Excel Macros and VBA Code
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter Performance in 2026: Impeller, DevTools, and Rebuild Reduction
item.description: A practical Flutter performance guide for 2026, covering what to measure, where jank usually starts, and how to reduce rebuild and startup pain.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: 30 Excel Keyboard Shortcuts That Save Hours Every Week
item.description: The 30 most useful Excel keyboard shortcuts for navigation, selection, formatting, and formulas — grouped by category so you can learn them faster.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Generate Single-Cell Formulas With Copilot in Excel: Fast Wins and Failure Modes
item.description: Learn when Copilot is useful for one-off Excel formulas, how to prompt it cleanly, and how to catch the failure modes before you trust the result.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Excel Tables Best Practices: Structured References, Growth, and Cleaner Models
item.description: Learn practical Excel table habits that make reports easier to maintain, formulas easier to read, and AI or dashboard workflows far more reliable.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Build an Interactive Dashboard in Excel (No VBA)
item.description: Build a professional Excel dashboard using pivot tables, charts, and slicers — no VBA or add-ins required. Includes a step-by-step walkthrough with a real sales dataset.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Responsive Flutter UI for Mobile, Tablet, Desktop, and Web
item.description: Learn how to build responsive Flutter interfaces that hold up across mobile, tablet, desktop, and web without relying on brittle one-off layouts.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Power Query in Excel to Automate Data Cleaning
item.description: Power Query records every data transformation step and replays it automatically. Learn how to import, clean, and reshape data from any source without manual work.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Create Charts With Copilot in Excel: What Works, What Needs Manual Cleanup
item.description: Learn when Copilot helps with charts in Excel, where it still needs manual cleanup, and how to review the result before sharing it widely.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Fix #SPILL! Errors in Excel and Prevent Them in Dynamic Array Models
item.description: Learn the practical causes of #SPILL! errors in Excel and how to fix and prevent them in dynamic-array workbooks.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Clean Messy Data in Excel: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Duplicates, blanks, inconsistent text, wrong formats — this step-by-step guide shows the fastest ways to clean messy spreadsheet data using Excel's built-in tools.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Highlight Rows Based on Cell Value in Excel
item.description: Use conditional formatting to highlight rows, add colour scales, create data bars, and build custom rules in Excel — with step-by-step instructions for each technique.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Add Flutter to an Existing App: Mobile and Web Integration Patterns
item.description: Learn practical patterns for adding Flutter to an existing product without turning the integration into a long-term maintenance burden.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Text Analysis in Excel With AI: Survey Comments, Reviews, and Open Feedback
item.description: Learn how to use AI with Excel to analyse survey comments, product reviews, and open-text feedback without turning the process into a black box.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Create a Pivot Table in Excel Step by Step
item.description: Never built a pivot table before? This guide walks you through creating your first pivot table in Excel with a real sales data example — no experience needed.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Audit Formulas in Excel: Trace Precedents, Dependents, and Error Sources
item.description: Learn how to audit formulas in Excel so you can trace errors faster, understand dependencies, and reduce hidden spreadsheet risk.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: VLOOKUP vs XLOOKUP: Differences and When to Use Each
item.description: XLOOKUP is newer and more flexible — but VLOOKUP still has its place. This comparison covers syntax, limitations, and practical examples to help you decide which to use.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Flutter Testing Strategy in 2026: Unit, Widget, Integration, and Goldens
item.description: Learn how to choose the right mix of unit, widget, integration, and golden tests in Flutter without building a slow test suite no one trusts.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Python in Excel for Beginners: The First 10 Things Worth Learning
item.description: Learn the first practical things worth understanding about Python in Excel so you can move beyond hype and decide where it genuinely helps.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Set Up and Use Microsoft Copilot in Excel (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to getting started with Microsoft Copilot in Excel — from enabling it to asking your first data analysis questions. Includes real prompt examples.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Protect an Excel Workbook Without Breaking Collaboration and Shared Editing
item.description: Learn how to protect an Excel workbook sensibly so formulas and structure stay safer without making collaboration more painful than necessary.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Use Claude AI to Write Excel Formulas Instantly
item.description: Describe what you need in plain English and Claude AI writes the Excel formula for you — including nested functions, multi-condition lookups, and error handling.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: PY Function in Excel: What It Is, How It Works, and When to Use It
item.description: Learn what the PY function in Excel is for, how it fits into Python in Excel workflows, and when it is worth using instead of ordinary formulas.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: How to Create a Calendar in Excel That Updates Automatically Every Month
item.description: Learn how to build an Excel calendar that updates automatically so you can reuse it for schedules, planning, and lightweight team coordination.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Copilot in Excel With Python: Forecasting, Risk Analysis, and Deeper Reasoning
item.description: Learn how Copilot and Python in Excel can work together for deeper analysis, and where you still need human judgement before trusting the result.

item.title: How to Make a Gantt Chart in Excel for Real Project Planning
item.description: Learn how to build a practical Gantt chart in Excel that is useful for real project planning rather than just looking like a template.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Copilot vs Gemini for Excel in 2026
item.description: A practical comparison of ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, and Gemini for Excel work in 2026, focused on task fit rather than brand hype.

item.description: Learn how to build an inventory tracker in Excel that stays clean, maintainable, and useful instead of becoming a brittle stock spreadsheet.

item.title: How to Review AI-Generated Excel Formulas Before You Trust Them

item.title: Use AI to Write and Fix Power Query M Code for Excel
item.description: Learn how AI can help with Power Query M code in Excel, where it saves time, and how to review the result before trusting the transformation logic.

item.description: Learn how to build a practical project tracker in Excel that stays maintainable instead of collapsing into status clutter and hidden logic.

item.title: Build a Forecasting Model in Excel With AI Assistance Step by Step
item.description: Learn how AI can help you build an Excel forecasting model faster while still keeping the assumptions and logic reviewable.

item.description: Learn how to build a simple sales pipeline tracker in Excel that small teams can maintain without turning it into a CRM lookalike.

item.description: Learn practical Excel and AI workflows for accountants, focused on reconciliations, variance review, and close preparation rather than vague automation claims.

item.title: How to Create an Amortization Schedule in Excel With Extra Payment Scenarios
item.description: Learn how to create an amortisation schedule in Excel, including extra payment scenarios that make the sheet more useful for real planning.

item.title: Excel + AI for Sales Ops: Pipeline Cleanup, Forecasts, and Territory Reporting
item.description: Learn practical Excel and AI workflows for Sales Ops, focused on pipeline cleanup, forecasting support, and territory reporting.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)

item.title: Map Charts in Excel: When to Use Them, Data Prep, and Common Mistakes
item.description: Learn when map charts in Excel are useful, how to prepare the location data properly, and the mistakes that make them misleading.
item.author: noreply@sagnikbhattacharya.com (Sagnik Bhattacharya)
